sourceBrief.title: Green Goods x Octant: Crowdfunding UI Alignment Brief
sourceBrief.correction: The primary problem is Octant V2 Ethereum vault crowdfunding UI, not the existing Garden /fund surface.

greenpill-nyc.label: Greenpill NYC
greenpill-nyc.transactionEnablement: enabled only after deployed Octant V2 Ethereum vault metadata is recorded in the manifest

evmavericks.label: EVMavericks Fantasy Football League
evmavericks.transactionEnablement: Wallet Endow and Card Endow disabled until the required manifest is supplied

phasePlan.purpose: Dedicated public /vaults crowdfunding route for Greenpill NYC and EVMavericks Octant V2 Ethereum vault campaigns, followed by Codex-owned reusable octant-vault-crowdfunding skill delivery after demo validation.

phases.name: Brief/scope lock + Linear sync
exitCriteria: brief/spec/plan/eval/status align on dedicated /vaults route scope
Greenpill NYC and EVMavericks are locked as first-demo fixture slots
/fund is recorded as reuse context only, not the primary route
Donate and Card Donate remain deferred
Linear issues carry the corrected attached-brief tracking note

phases.name: /vaults campaign route + manifest
exitCriteria: /vaults route scaffold and campaign browse states are ready
Greenpill NYC and EVMavericks fixture slots exist in the manifest
EVMavericks is marked blocked_pending_manifest until required vault metadata is supplied
Users can inspect campaign copy and onchain context without wallet connection

phases.name: Wallet-last Wallet Endow path
exitCriteria: Users choose vault and amount before wallet connection
Wallet Endow deposits only for complete-manifest fixtures
Greenpill NYC is the first available transaction fixture when its deployed vault metadata is recorded
EVMavericks transaction controls remain disabled while blocked_pending_manifest
Connected wallet owns the resulting position

phases.name: Ownership/share verification gate
exitCriteria: Wallet-funded shares are visible for the connected wallet on complete-manifest fixtures
Recovered-wallet Card Endow shares are verified for the recovered wallet on complete-manifest fixtures
No provider-owned custody path can receive vault shares

phases.name: Thirdweb Card Endow demo path
exitCriteria: Thirdweb checkout targets a user-owned recovered wallet receiverAddress for complete-manifest fixtures only
EVMavericks Card Endow remains disabled while blocked_pending_manifest
Webhook/provider proof verifies exact chain, token, amount, destination, transaction, method, and intent
Public manage/withdraw proof exists before Card Endow exposure

phases.name: Demo QA validates /vaults
exitCriteria: Desktop and mobile browser proof covers final public /vaults demo
Greenpill NYC and EVMavericks fixture slots are both visible
Wallet-last flow, Wallet Endow, Thirdweb Card Endow gates, privacy, i18n, and copy are verified
Donate/Card Donate are absent and /fund was not redesigned as the primary route

phases.name: Codex authors reusable octant-vault-crowdfunding skill + templates
exitCriteria: Green Goods /vaults demo validation is complete
Canonical skill artifact plan targets .claude/skills/octant-vault-crowdfunding/
.agents/skills mirror expectations after bun run skills:sync are recorded
Skill templates cover existing Ethereum Octant vault UI using standard RPC plus wallet connection
Advanced module specs cover Thirdweb-first card providers, Coinbase/Stripe future adapters, and optional create-vault via Octant Ethereum factory/API path

phases.name: Skill dry-run QA + Linear closeout
exitCriteria: Skill static checks are listed for the later artifact: bun run skills:sync and bun run check:skills
Dry-run proof covers Greenpill NYC, EVMavericks blocked_pending_manifest, and one synthetic complete manifest fixture
Linear skill issues PRD-569 through PRD-573 carry current durable descriptions and closeout evidence
Project is not complete until the skill lane passes

agentOrchestration.linearRole: durable tracking, issue comments, check-in state, and validation visibility; not the implementation truth

lanes.claude_ui: Own /vaults UI, Greenpill NYC and EVMavericks campaign cards, blocked-pending-manifest states, wallet-last flow, receipt/manage states, responsive layout, i18n, and visible QA pass 1.
lanes.codex_state_api: Own shared manifest/receiver/provider contracts, EVMavericks manifest gate, Thirdweb checkout/webhook gates, targeted shared/agent tests, and QA pass 2.
lanes.contracts: No Solidity/deploy/indexer work unless a narrow Octant V2 config need is proven before editing.
lanes.codex_skill: After demo QA validation, own the reusable octant-vault-crowdfunding agent skill delivery: canonical .claude/skills artifact plan, templates, fixture examples, advanced module specs, .agents/skills mirror expectations after skills:sync, static checks, and pilot plus synthetic dry-run QA.
lanes.linear: Mirror phase gates and corrected scope on PRD issues.

planMetadata: node scripts/harness/plan-hub.mjs linear-sync --feature nyc-vault-crowdfunding --json returns zero warnings
node scripts/harness/plan-hub.mjs validate may remain blocked by unrelated sentry-stack-observability hub schema drift unless that drift is fixed

shared: campaign/vault manifest typing for existing Octant V2 Ethereum vaults
pilot fixture status for greenpill-nyc and evmavericks
receiver typing for Wallet Endow and Thirdweb Card Endow
Card Endow proof-key separation from Card Donate
client: browse-without-wallet campaign states for Greenpill NYC and EVMavericks
EVMavericks disabled transaction state until required manifest fields are supplied
Thirdweb Card Endow hidden until receiver/share/public manage/provider proof
only targeted /fund compatibility tests if Card Endow reusable capability touches shared /fund code
browser: final public /vaults demo proof required on desktop and mobile
skill: Codex-owned reusable octant-vault-crowdfunding skill lane starts after demo QA validation
.agents/skills mirror expectations after bun run skills:sync are recorded
templates cover campaign context, existing vault manifest, wallet RPC assumptions, and implementation handoff
fixtures cover Greenpill NYC, EVMavericks blocked_pending_manifest, and one synthetic complete manifest
advanced modules cover Thirdweb first, Coinbase/Stripe future adapters, optional Octant Ethereum factory/API create-vault module
later artifact validation lists bun run skills:sync, bun run check:skills, and pilot/synthetic dry-run QA

notes: Corrected on 2026-06-01 against the attached Green Goods x Octant crowdfunding brief.
The primary route is /vaults, a dedicated Octant V2 Ethereum vault crowdfunding surface. No /vault alias or redirect is planned in this cleanup.
Greenpill NYC and EVMavericks are locked as the first-demo fixture slots.
Greenpill NYC remains the first available transaction fixture when its deployed vault metadata is recorded.

EVMavericks transaction work is blocked_pending_manifest until chain ID, vault address, asset address/symbol/decimals, recipient/routing summary, Protocol Guild destination context, explorer link, and campaign copy are supplied.
The previous /fund-centered problem statement was wrong. Existing Garden /fund remains separate and is reuse context only.
The only /fund relationship in this plan is future-compatible Card Endow receiver/proof capability reuse, not route implementation.
Wallet Endow and Thirdweb Card Endow are in Green Goods demo scope for complete-manifest fixtures.
Thirdweb Card Endow remains hidden until recovered-wallet receiver custody, vault-share visibility, public manage/withdraw proof, and strict webhook/provider proof pass.
Card Endow vault shares must belong to the user/recovered wallet, not a provider-owned account.
Public Donate and Card Donate are deferred and must not appear in /vaults acceptance.
Green Goods Arbitrum vault factory/contracts are product context and must not be presented as Octant deployed Ethereum infrastructure.
Reusable octant-vault-crowdfunding skill delivery starts after Green Goods demo validation and is the final project deliverable.
The later skill artifact is planned for .claude/skills/octant-vault-crowdfunding/ and mirrored into .agents/skills after bun run skills:sync.
Skill v1 is an agent skill plus templates, not a runnable generator or full packaged app.
Skill dry-run proof must cover Greenpill NYC, EVMavericks blocked_pending_manifest, and one synthetic complete manifest fixture.
Check-in gates are required after phases 2, 3, 5, 6, and 8.
status.json is authoritative; branch names are automation signals.
.plans/ is the durable repo truth; Linear is the durable tracking mirror.

ui.handoff_note: Implement and verify the dedicated public /vaults route for Greenpill NYC and EVMavericks Octant V2 Ethereum vault crowdfunding: campaign browse without wallet, amount-first/wallet-last flow, blocked-pending-manifest state for EVMavericks, Wallet Endow for complete-manifest fixtures, route-local receipt/manage states, Donate/Card Donate absent, and Thirdweb Card Endow hidden until state/API proof gates pass. Do not redesign /fund as the primary route. Add i18n.

state_api.handoff_note: Own shared campaign/vault manifest types, Greenpill NYC and EVMavericks fixture status, EVMavericks blocked_pending_manifest gate, Octant V2 Ethereum vault tuple semantics, Wallet Endow receiver semantics, Thirdweb Card Endow recovered-wallet receiverAddress enforcement, exact provider/webhook proof separation, recovered-owner share verification, redacted logs, and future-compatible Card Endow capability reuse for /fund without making /fund the current route.

contracts.handoff_note: No Solidity, deployment broadcast, or indexer schema work is planned. Existing Octant V2 Ethereum vaults are the target; Green Goods Arbitrum contracts are context only.

tdd.note: The plan targets existing Octant V2 Ethereum vaults and route/state/API work only.

qa_pass_1.handoff_note: Review the visible /vaults demo: Greenpill NYC and EVMavericks fixture slots, EVMavericks blocked-pending-manifest state, campaign comprehension before wallet connection, wallet-last flow, Wallet Endow on complete-manifest fixtures, Thirdweb Card Endow hidden-until-proof, mobile layout, i18n, Donate/Card Donate absence, and no /fund redesign.

qa_pass_2.handoff_note: Re-run targeted shared/client/agent validation, inspect Thirdweb provider proof, recovered-owner share gates, and EVMavericks manifest blocking behavior, require browser proof for the final public /vaults demo, and confirm no unrelated Garden /fund/PWA/admin work was pulled in.

skill.handoff_note: After demo QA validation, deliver the reusable octant-vault-crowdfunding agent skill plan plus templates: canonical .claude/skills/octant-vault-crowdfunding/ artifact plan, .agents/skills mirror expectations after bun run skills:sync, Greenpill NYC and EVMavericks fixtures plus one synthetic complete manifest, simplest existing-vault runtime guidance, Thirdweb-first card module, Coinbase/Stripe future adapter boundaries, optional Octant Ethereum factory/API create-vault module, backend custody/secrets/webhook/receipt/logging boundaries, static checks, and dry-run proof.

tdd.note: The skill lane is an agentic guidance artifact lane; acceptance is static skill validation plus pilot/synthetic dry-run QA after the later artifact is authored.

history.note: Renamed active plan hub to nyc-vault-crowdfunding.

Corrected plan truth to the attached Octant crowdfunding brief: dedicated /vaults route, Octant V2 Ethereum vault crowdfunding, /fund reuse-only boundary, Donate/Card Donate deferred, and reusable skill after demo validation.

Commented PRD-435, PRD-436, PRD-437, PRD-438, PRD-439, PRD-440, PRD-441, PRD-442, PRD-443, PRD-444, PRD-487, and PRD-569 through PRD-573 with the dedicated /vaults route correction and /fund reuse-only boundary.
Locked /vaults as canonical, added Greenpill NYC and EVMavericks first-demo fixture slots, and marked EVMavericks blocked_pending_manifest until its Octant V2 Ethereum vault metadata is supplied.

Updated Linear issue descriptions for PRD-435 through PRD-438, PRD-440, PRD-442 through PRD-444, PRD-487, and PRD-569 through PRD-573; refreshed stale titles where they would point implementers back to /fund or away from NYC + EVMavericks.
Promoted reusable octant-vault-crowdfunding skill delivery to a first-class Codex-owned final deliverable after demo QA validation, with static plus pilot/synthetic dry-run QA.
Updated PRD-569 through PRD-573 as active skill-lane workstreams, corrected PRD-441 as the /vaults demo QA blocker, and added final superseding Linear comments.
